name: Ben & Jerry's Sweet Cream Base #1
recipeInstructions: This is Ben and Jerry's most popular base, with a creamy texture, medium body, and a subtle, understated taste. It's especially good as a background for fruit, cookies, and candy. Whisk the eggs in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes. Gradually whisk in the sugar, then continue to whisk until completely blended, about 1 minute more. Pour in the cream and milk and whisk to blend. Makes 1 quart.
